text.title: Email Lifecycle Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Email Lifecycle Architecture output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: compliance_basis missing for any program targeting EU/UK/CA

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: lifecycle_map populated with a typed value
frequency_cap populated with a typed value
suppression_list_id populated with a typed value
consent_records populated with a typed value
compliance_basis populated with a typed value
audit_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
